class.name: Node4D
class.brief_description: A 4D game object, inherited by all 4D-related nodes.
class.description: A 4D game object, with a 4D transformation. All 4D nodes inherit from Node4D. Has a [member transform] which can be decomposed into a [Vector4] [member position], [Vector4] [member scale], [Euler4D] [member rotation].

method.name: apply_scale
method.description: Apply a scale to this [Node4D] in the parent-relative space. If you want to scale in object-local space, just multiply [member scale].

method.name: translate_local
method.description: Translate this [Node4D] in object-local space. If you want to translate in parent-relative space, just add to [member position].

members.member: The transformation basis of this [Node4D]. This is the same as [code]transform.basis[/code].
The position of this [Node4D]. This is the same as [code]transform.origin[/code].
The rotation of this [Node4D], in the form of an [Euler4D]. The first 3 angles are analogous to 3D rotation.
The scale of this [Node4D]. This is the length of each basis vector.
The transformation matrix of this [Node4D]. This is a combination of [member basis] and [member origin].
